잠언 7:1.content: My son, keep my words. Lay up my commandments within you.

잠언 7:2.content: Keep my commandments and live! Guard my teaching as the apple of your eye.

잠언 7:3.content: Bind them on your fingers. Write them on the tablet of your heart.

잠언 7:4.content: Tell wisdom, “You are my sister.” Call understanding your relative,

잠언 7:5.content: that they may keep you from the strange woman, from the foreigner who flatters with her words.

잠언 7:6.content: For at the window of my house, I looked out through my lattice.

잠언 7:7.content: I saw among the simple ones. I discerned among the youths a young man void of understanding,

잠언 7:8.content: passing through the street near her corner, he went the way to her house,

잠언 7:9.content: in the twilight, in the evening of the day, in the middle of the night and in the darkness.

잠언 7:10.content: Behold, there a woman met him with the attire of a prostitute, and with crafty intent.

잠언 7:11.content: She is loud and defiant. Her feet don’t stay in her house.

잠언 7:12.content: Now she is in the streets, now in the squares, and lurking at every corner.

잠언 7:13.content: So she caught him, and kissed him. With an impudent face she said to him:

잠언 7:14.content: “Sacrifices of peace offerings are with me. Today I have paid my vows.

잠언 7:15.content: Therefore I came out to meet you, to diligently seek your face, and I have found you.

잠언 7:16.content: I have spread my couch with carpets of tapestry, with striped cloths of the yarn of Egypt.

잠언 7:17.content: I have perfumed my bed with myrrh, aloes, and cinnamon.

잠언 7:18.content: Come, let’s take our fill of loving until the morning. Let’s solace ourselves with loving.

잠언 7:19.content: For my husband isn’t at home. He has gone on a long journey.

잠언 7:20.content: He has taken a bag of money with him. He will come home at the full moon.”

잠언 7:21.content: With persuasive words, she led him astray. With the flattering of her lips, she seduced him.

잠언 7:22.content: He followed her immediately, as an ox goes to the slaughter, as a fool stepping into a noose.

잠언 7:23.content: Until an arrow strikes through his liver, as a bird hurries to the snare, and doesn’t know that it will cost his life.

잠언 7:24.content: Now therefore, sons, listen to me. Pay attention to the words of my mouth.

잠언 7:25.content: Don’t let your heart turn to her ways. Don’t go astray in her paths,

잠언 7:26.content: for she has thrown down many wounded. Yes, all her slain are a mighty army.

잠언 7:27.content: Her house is the way to Sheol, going down to the rooms of death.
